overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a first-person walk along the Los Santos waterfront. The character moves from a marina area past palm-lined sidewalks overlooking a beach parking lot, then crosses a busy highway intersection. Bright midday sun illuminates the modern architecture and coastal environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront marina with yacht docks and modern residential towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy waterfront promenade overlooking the marina canal

entered.detail: calm water canal with concrete walls separating the marina from the walkway
wooden dock structures extending into the water for mooring boats
tall cylindrical glass and steel residential towers with balconies
low-rise building with terracotta roof tiles and white stucco walls
well-maintained grass slope with bushes separating walkway from lower area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront marina with a canal running through the center. Modern glass condo towers rise in the distance while a Mediterranean-style villa sits closer on the right. The camera walks forward along a grassy embankment with the marina docks visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway sidewalk lined with palm trees

events.description: transitions from grassy waterfront to concrete sidewalk alongside multi-lane highway
passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction while talking on phone

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the highway, passing rows of palm trees and a large billboard

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera while talking on a cell phone

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway with visible expansion joints
textured concrete wall separating sidewalk from lower parking area
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic and street lamps
line of tall palm trees along the sidewalk edge
large yellow advertisement billboard with red and blue text
factory structures with visible smokestack emitting smoke

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a concrete sidewalk running alongside a busy highway. Palm trees line the right side behind a retaining wall, while traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the left. The camera passes a pedestrian talking on a phone and continues past a large yellow billboard advertising sightseeing tours.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk overlooking beach parking lot

events.description: view opens up to reveal beach parking lot and shoreline below the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated sidewalk with views of the beach parking lot and ocean below

entered.detail: large asphalt parking area with red and white painted sections and parked cars
metal fence separating sidewalk from the lower parking area
canopy structures and beach facilities near the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated sidewalk, the camera overlooks a large beach parking lot below to the right, enclosed by a chain-link fence. The modern condo towers become visible again in the distance, and beach structures can be seen near the shoreline. The palm trees continue along the path as the sidewalk curves gently.

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane highway at the marked crosswalk
black pickup truck passes through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the highway while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with multiple lanes and traffic markings
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface
traffic light poles with signal heads at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a highway intersection, leaving the waterfront behind. The camera steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road as vehicles including a black pickup truck navigate the intersection. Industrial buildings with smokestacks loom in the distance as the crosswalk continues across the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a serene waterfront marina toward a bustling urban highway intersection. It begins by walking along a grassy embankment beside a canal, with a Mediterranean-style villa and distant glass condo towers under a bright midday sun. As the camera moves forward, the scenery shifts to a concrete sidewalk where palm trees line a retaining wall and traffic flows along a multi-lane road, passing a pedestrian and a large yellow sightseeing billboard. The path then curves to overlook a fenced-in beach parking lot and shoreline structures before the modern towers reappear on the horizon. Finally, the camera leaves the waterfront behind to step onto a crosswalk, crossing the asphalt amidst vehicles like a black pickup truck as industrial smokestacks loom in the distance.
